name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `cimishi --config ...`
2. ...

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages or logs if available.

## Environment

- **OS:** (e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14)
- **Rust version:** (output of `rustc --version`)
- **cimishi version:** (output of `cimishi --version`)
- **Config format:** (TOML / YAML / JSON)
- **Storage backend:** (local / S3 / Azure / GCS)

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information (config file, query, stack trace).
